policy: permit(principal, action, resource) when { false && ip("256.0.0.1").isIpv4() };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { true  || ip("256.0.0.1").isIpv4() };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { if true then 1 == 1 else (decimal("0.12345").lessThan(decimal("0.5"))) };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { if false then (decimal("0.12345").lessThan(decimal("0.5"))) else 1 == 1 };
permit(principal == User::"alice", action, resource in Document::"doc1") when { action == Action::"view" || action == Action::"edit" };
permit(principal, action, resource) unless { action == Action::"admin" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal is User } unless { resource == Document::"doc2" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal in Group::"users" } unless { action == Action::"admin" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { (principal == User::"alice" && action == Action::"view") || (principal == User::"bob" && resource is Document) };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal is User && resource is Document && action == Action::"view" };
forbid(principal, action, resource) when { action == Action::"admin" && !(principal in Group::"admins") };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal == User::"alice" && resource == Document::"doc1" };
permit(principal, action == Action::"view", resource is Document);
permit(principal in Group::"admins", action in [Action::"edit", Action::"admin"], resource);
permit(principal, action, resource) when { principal in Group::"users" || principal in Group::"admins" };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { !(!(principal is User)) };
permit(principal, action, resource) when { action == Action::"view" || action == Action::"edit" || action == Action::"admin" };
